data.title: Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of LITGRID AB on 29 Dec 2025, 10:00 am at Vilnius, to decide on agenda.
data.description: The Board of LITGRID AB has announced an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders to be held on December 29, 2025, at 10:00 am at the company's registered office located at Karlo Gustavo Emilio Manerheimo g. 8, LT-05131, Vilnius. LITGRID AB (company code 302564383) is the organizing entity, and the meeting will take place in hall No. 229.

data.title: Jeffrey Skumin promoted to CFO of Embassy Bancorp, Inc. and Embassy Bank for the Lehigh Valley, effective Dec. 31, 2025.
data.description: Bethlehem, Pennsylvania - Embassy Bancorp, Inc. has announced the promotion of Jeffrey Skumin to Chief Financial Officer (CFO) of the Company and its subsidiary bank, Embassy Bank for the Lehigh Valley, effective December 31, 2025. Jeffrey Skumin will be taking over the CFO position, overseeing the finance department of Embassy. This appointment is seen as a key move in the financial strategy and growth of the organization. Embassy Bancorp, Inc. operates on the OTCQX market under the ticker symbol EMYB.

data.title: Valero Energy Corp (NYSE: VLO) to report Q4 & FY 2025 earnings on Jan 29, 2026. Conference call at 10:00 a.m. ET. Webcast on investorvalero.com.
data.description: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) headquartered in San Antonio, will announce its financial and operational performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on January 29, 2026, before the market opens. A conference call will be held by management at 10:00 a.m. ET on the same day to review the results. You can access a live webcast of the call on Valero’s Investor Relations website, investorvalero.com. Valero Energy Corporation, along with its subsidiaries, is a notable player in the energy industry.

data.title: Biorep Technologies' PRISM System for islet isolation proves reproducibility and research readiness, marking first successful independent use.
data.description: New findings validate the replicability and preparedness for research of Biorep's latest laboratory platform for islet isolation. Biorep Technologies, known for their innovative cell and tissue isolation systems, stated that the initial human trial results signify a major advancement in the field. The platform has demonstrated a high success rate in isolating islets, with 97% efficiency in cell retention and purity levels exceeding 90%. The company's recent achievements highlight their commitment to cutting-edge technology and biomedical research.

data.title: Arthur D. Little and Vega IT announce 50/50 joint venture, Axceler8 Solutions, for digital innovation.
data.description: A collaboration between Arthur D. Little and Vega IT has led to the establishment of Axceler8 Solutions, a joint venture with each party owning an equal 50% stake.

data.title: Africa is seeing growth in data centers, with around 120 existing ones, and strong expansion in Nigeria, Kenya, Egypt, and South Africa. Morocco leads the upcoming data center market in Africa.
data.description: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has introduced the "Africa Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database, revealing over 120 operating data centers in Africa, particularly in countries such as South Africa and Nigeria. The region is experiencing a surge in upcoming data centers, with Nigeria, Kenya, Egypt, and South Africa emerging as key markets. Morocco is leading the way in the upcoming data center market in Africa, indicating a promising trend in the industry.

data.title: Network Security Market projected to reach $119.70 billion by 2030, growing at a CAGR of 7.2% from $84.50 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of December 5, 2025, the Network Security Market is anticipated to increase from $84.50 billion in 2025 to $119.70 billion by 2030, with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.2% throughout this period. A total of 400 market...

data.title: Brookfield Residential teams up with property owners to fast-track rebuilding efforts after fires in Palisades and Altadena.
data.description: Brookfield Residential has partnered with property owners to expedite the process of rebuilding. The 'Builders Alliance,' which includes Brookfield Residential, has connected Palisades and Altadena homeowners to aid in their return to their communities. The initiative aims to streamline the rebuilding process and support affected residents. This partnership was formed in Los Angeles, announced on December 5, 2025.

data.title: Preliminary data from FANSS study suggest blood-based lung cancer detection potential in Asian non-smoking women.
data.description: Data from the FANSS study, shared at ESMO Asia 2025, showcases the practicality of screening non-smoking Asian women. DELFI Diagnostics, Inc., based in PALO ALTO, Calif., revealed this information on Dec. 5, 2025. They specialize in providing easy-to-access blood-based, liquid biopsy tests that offer a novel approach to improving early detection.

France's President Emmanuel Macron had a break from formal talks for fun table tennis rallies in Chengdu, China. He joined French & Chinese players in men's & mixed doubles matches amid cheers, capping his 4th state visit with Xi Jinping on a high note.

data.title: Delta Community Credit Union to award $150,000 to 20 Atlanta nonprofits in 2026 Philanthropic Fund grant program.
data.description: A credit union in Atlanta will be distributing a total of $150,000 among 20 local nonprofits in the metro area as part of its 13th annual grant program. The Delta Community Credit Union revealed the recipients of its 2026 Philanthropic Fund grants, highlighting the organization's dedication to supporting communities in metro Atlanta.

data.title: Criminal IP hosting webinar on Dec 16 at 11:00 AM PT discussing cyberattack strategies and the rise in incidents.
data.description: A webinar hosted by Criminal IP is scheduled to take place on December 16, 2025 at 11:00 AM Pacific Time. The event will highlight the changing cyberattack strategies, particularly the rise in incidents stemming from vulnerable digital assets.

data.title: Astemo Americas opens new office in East Liberty, Ohio next to Transportation Research Center Inc.
data.description: In East Liberty, Ohio on December 5, 2025, Astemo Americas, Inc. revealed the establishment of a new sales and engineering office. This office, located adjacent to an independent test course run by Transportation Research Center Inc., aims to...

data.title: Charitable group RRT thanks 16,500 volunteers in 14 countries for their service and names 2026 Year of the Volunteer.
data.description: The philanthropic organization associated with the Plymouth Brethren Christian Church acknowledges the outstanding efforts of 16,500 volunteers across 14 nations for their committed support to individuals in distress. They have declared 2026 as the 'Year of the Volunteer'. The Rapid Relief Team (RRT) based in JOPPA, Md., shared this announcement on December 5, 2025.

data.title: Suffolk and Lee County Port Authority celebrate topping off phase 2 of Southwest Florida International Airport terminal expansion, Lee County's largest public works project.
data.description: In Fort Myers, Florida, Suffolk, a prominent builder in the US, recently joined forces with the Lee County Port Authority (LCPA) to commemorate the topping off of Phase 2 of the Terminal Expansion Project at Southwest Florida International Airport (RSW). This event signifies a significant achievement in Lee County's largest public works initiative to date. The ongoing expansion, spanning multiple years, continues to advance according to schedule, highlighting Suffolk's adept project coordination and successful partnership with LCPA.

data.title: Anton Plumbing Heating & Cooling in New Jersey advises on cutting winter heating costs as rising electricity prices and early temperature drops pose challenges.
data.description: With electricity prices on the rise and an early onset of winter causing temperatures to drop, there is anticipated added strain on home heating systems. Anton Plumbing Heating & Cooling in Old Bridge, New Jersey, suggests homeowners to book seasonal heating inspections promptly to ensure efficient functioning amidst these challenges. This recommendation comes as a proactive measure to address the growing concern, especially in light of the current economic conditions and a significant 30% increase in electricity rates. Early intervention through inspections can help prevent breakdowns and optimize heating performance, offering households a cost-effective solution in managing the winter season's demands.
